q: What are your plans after you finish your studies?
examiner_note:
Giám khảo muốn nghe về định hướng tương lai của bạn. 
- **Hướng dẫn trả lời**: Bạn có thể nói về việc tìm việc làm, khởi nghiệp, học tiếp lên cao (Thạc sĩ/Tiến sĩ), hoặc đi du học. 
- **Mẹo**: Sử dụng các cụm từ chỉ tương lai như 'I intend to', 'I'm planning to', 'My ultimate goal is to', 'I aspire to' và từ vựng về thị trường lao động.

band7.text: After graduation, I plan to look for a job in a big marketing firm. I want to gain some practical experience in the industry and improve my professional skills. Maybe after a few years of working, I will consider studying for a Master's degree.
band7.note: Kế hoạch rõ ràng, đi từ việc tìm việc đến học nâng cao. Từ vựng phù hợp ('graduation', 'practical experience').

band8.text: Once I've completed my degree, I'm intending to apply for an internship at an international organization. My goal is to immerse myself in a professional environment and build a strong network of contacts, which I believe is essential for my long-term career prospects.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng tốt ('immerse myself', 'network of contacts', 'career prospects'). Cấu trúc câu linh hoạt.

band9.text: Upon finishing my undergraduate studies, I aspire to secure a scholarship for a Master's program abroad, specifically in the UK. I'm keen on further specializing in behavioral economics, as I believe it will provide me with a competitive edge in the global job market.
band9.note: Từ vựng ở trình độ rất cao ('aspire to', 'secure a scholarship', 'competitive edge'). Diễn đạt cực kỳ học thuật và thuyết phục.

v.example: After graduation, I spent a few months traveling before looking for work.
I intend to apply for several jobs in the tech sector.
Young musicians aspire to perform at world-famous venues.
He worked incredibly hard to secure a scholarship for his PhD.
Fluency in multiple languages gives you a competitive edge in the job market.

v.meaning: thị trường việc làm toàn cầu
v.example: Universities aim to prepare students for the demands of the global job market.
I want to further specialize in intellectual property law.
The best way to learn a language is to immerse yourself in the culture.
Internships allow students to experience a professional environment firsthand.
Saving money is part of my long-term financial planning.
Graduates from this university have excellent career prospects.
I'm currently doing an internship at a law firm.
During my undergraduate studies, I spent a semester in France.
She has been accepted into a Master's program in public health.
I'm going to apply for a visa to study in the US.

v.meaning: đạt được kinh nghiệm thực tế
v.example: It's important to gain practical experience before starting your own business.
The workshops focus on developing essential professional skills.
The tourism industry has been greatly affected by the pandemic.

v.meaning: mạng lưới các mối quan hệ
v.example: Building a strong network of contacts is key to finding a good job.
Water is essential for all living things.
New graduates often find the labor market to be very competitive.
The company has improved its recruitment process to attract top talent.
Starting with an entry-level job is a good way to learn the ropes.
He's hoping to get a promotion at the end of the year.
I'm still thinking about which career path to choose.
Many adults return to college for further education.
Modern medicine requires a high degree of specialization.
The university provides support for students interested in entrepreneurship.
They are planning to launch their own tech start-up next year.
Freelancing offers a lot of flexibility but also some uncertainty.

v.meaning: sự cân bằng giữa công việc và cuộc sống
v.example: Maintaining a good work-life balance is important for long-term health.
The company encourages ongoing professional development for all staff.
Our products meet all current industry standards for safety.
I was very nervous before my first job interview.
Don't forget to update your resume before applying for the position.
A well-written cover letter can make a big difference.
The region has seen a rise in full-time employment.
Many workers faced redundancy after the factory closed down.
Nursing is more than just a job; it's a vocation.
Her ultimate ambition is to become a world-famous architect.
Graduating from university is a major milestone in anyone's life.
They want to travel the world before they settle down and start a family.

v.meaning: kỳ nghỉ phép dài hạn để nghiên cứu/nghỉ ngơi
v.example: He's taking a one-year sabbatical to write a book.
I'm willing to relocate to another city if the job is right.
It's never too early to start thinking about your pension scheme.
He's looking forward to his retirement after forty years of work.
The company is planning for a smooth succession of leadership.
The CEO shared her vision for the future of the company.
She worked hard to attain her goals.
Getting this degree is one of my greatest accomplishments.
